items.title: Rage clicks extracted from RageClickCount.subTotal
items.expected: rageClicks reads subTotal; absent metric yields 0; existing sessions/deadClicks/bounceRate are untouched.
items.evidence: Passed. Fixtures use the real response shape captured from live project-live-insights calls on 2026-07-22.

items.title: Scroll depth: a null reading is preserved as null, never 0
items.expected: null averageScrollDepth yields null; a genuine 0 stays 0 and is distinguishable from no reading; a missing ScrollDepth metric yields null.
items.evidence: Passed. This is the load-bearing case: `|| 0` would report 'visitors scrolled 0%' on a month with no reading.

items.title: Monthly rollup averages only days that carried a reading
items.expected: Rage clicks sum; scroll depth over readings of 40, null, 60 averages to 50 (not 33.3); a month with no readings returns null.
items.evidence: Passed, including rows stored as JSON strings.

items.title: No API change, no harvest change, no trend-score change
items.expected: Only the extractor, the metrics service and its test change. service.clarity-api.ts, clarityHarvestAdapter.ts and ClarityController.ts are untouched, and calculateTrendScore's formula is unchanged.
items.evidence: Diff limited to util.clarity-metrics-extraction.ts, service.clarity-metrics.ts, the new test file and this plan folder.
items.notes: Reweighting the trend score would silently move a number clients already see.

items.title: Metrics are available without an API change (live read)
items.precondition: A Clarity token for an Alloro-managed project
steps: 1. GET project-live-insights with no metric filter
2. List returned metricName values and inspect information[0] shapes
items.expected: RageClickCount and ScrollDepth are both present in the unfiltered response.
items.evidence: Ran 2026-07-22. 16 metric entries returned. On a project with real traffic: 30 sessions, ScrollDepth.averageScrollDepth = 44.42 (number, 0-100). On projects with no captured sessions: null. Both paths observed.
items.notes: Read-only. Unit read as percent from range and Clarity UI convention, not documentation.

items.title: BLOCKER: Clarity captures nothing on most mapped projects
items.precondition: Clarity tokens for the mapped projects
steps: 1. Call project-live-insights with numOfDays=3 across the mapped projects
2. Compare Traffic.totalSessionCount to the same window in Rybbit/Search Console
items.expected: Projects with live sites and real traffic report non-zero sessions.
items.evidence: Three of four sampled projects returned 0 sessions over 3 days; one returned 30. At least one silent project has real traffic in the same window by our own funnel numbers.
items.notes: Cause NOT diagnosed. Candidates: missing/dropped tracking snippet, or stale project-to-domain mapping. Recorded as BUILD-QUESTIONS.md Q3.

items.title: Prove the code path end to end on live data
items.precondition: Q3 resolved; Clarity capture restored on at least one proof site
steps: 1. Call /clarity/getKeyData for a project with restored capture
2. Compare rageClicks and scrollDepth against Clarity's own dashboard for the same window
items.expected: Non-zero rage clicks and a real scroll reading, matching Clarity's dashboard.
items.notes: This is why the PR is held as a draft. It does NOT close on unit tests: this code path has never returned a non-zero value end to end.
